customAttributes.description:
Purr Majesty

When this enchantment enters, you become the monarch.
At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. If you’re the monarch, create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying instead.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair Drop: Purr Majesty and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 6/19/2026 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText: She’s a generous ruler, but the cupcake belongs to her—alone!
